weekly_summary.activity_summary: Ephemeron GC hardening, Flambda2 reaper restructuring, Dune RPC consolidation, opam cleanup, and ocaml-index scalability work progressed across groups.
weekly_summary.activity:
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Ephemeron orphaning bug** fixed for 5.5 via [ocaml/ocaml#14718](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14718) by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche); a structured series of follow-up refactoring PRs ([ocaml/ocaml#14732](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14732), [ocaml/ocaml#14733](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14733), [ocaml/ocaml#14734](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14734), [ocaml/ocaml#14735](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14735)) opened to systematically clarify phase-change logic and fix the correctness bug on trunk
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Domain `unique_id` assignment** moved earlier during domain creation via [ocaml/ocaml#14716](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14716) by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche), improving debuggability of domain lifecycle logging
- __RUMINANT:core__ **GADT scope-escape hint** added to typechecker error messages via [ocaml/ocaml#14695](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14695) by [Stefan Muenzel](https://github.com/smuenzel); **typechecker memory usage fix** for pattern-matching exhaustiveness counter-example search proposed via [ocaml/ocaml#14727](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14727) by [Florian Angeletti](https://github.com/Octachron)
- __RUMINANT:core__ **`translmod.ml` refactoring** introducing a `lambda_subst` helper merged via [ocaml/ocaml#14728](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14728) by [Nicolás Ojeda Bär](https://github.com/nojb); **regression test for rectypes keep-expansion** merged via [ocaml/ocaml#14730](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14730) by [Brandon Stride](https://github.com/brandonzstride)
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Implicit source positions** RFC ([ocaml/RFCs#52](https://github.com/ocaml/RFCs/issues/52)) design converged toward options 2a/2b, with [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) and [Olivier Nicole](https://github.com/OlivierNicole) identifying 2a as an incremental first step toward the full 2b approach
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Flambda2 `dep_solver.ml`** split into separate modules by [Nathanaëlle Courant](https://github.com/Ekdohibs) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5776](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5776)) with follow-up cleanup ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5787](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5787)) and `field_{usages,sources}_top` removal ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5748](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5748)); **reaper code size computation** opened ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5793](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5793))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Draft SSA CFG backend variant** opened by [@ttebbi-janestreet](https://github.com/ttebbi-janestreet) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5810](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5810)); **empty loop deletion using induction variable analysis** draft opened by [Mark Shinwell](https://github.com/mshinwell) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5840](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5840))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Unboxed record/variant representation** rationalisation: all-value/void mixed records proposed as uniform blocks ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5774](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5774)), `float64` records as mixed blocks ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5796](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5796)), and `[@@flatten_floats]` requirement for mixed `float`/`float64` records ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5795](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5795)), all by [Ryan Tjoa](https://github.com/rtjoa)
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Layout polymorphism correctness** improved: instantiation restricted to static values ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5783](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5783)), var instantiation error changed to `fatal_error` ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5817](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5817)), `lpoly` generalise simplified via path compression by [Zesen Qian](https://github.com/riaqn) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5792](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5792))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Patricia trees** gained `union_total` function families to avoid allocations ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5803](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5803)) and callback modules for function specialisation ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5770](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5770)); **persistent env wrapper partial applications** eliminated, saving ~100 MB allocation when compiling `typecore.ml` ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5631](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5631))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Metaprogramming REPL** syntax directive issue fixed by [Andrej Ivašković](https://github.com/Dreian) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5801](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5801)); **graceful reporting of unsupported language features** in runtime metaprogramming merged ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5823](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5823))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Shon Feder](https://github.com/shonfeder) managed the **Dune 3.22.2 release process** ([ocaml/dune#14112](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14112)) reverting `--diff-command` to 3.21 behavior ([ocaml/dune#14098](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/pull/14098)), and continues work on release automation in [ocaml/dune#14115](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/pull/14115)
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Sudha Parimala](https://github.com/Sudha247) landed opam packaging checks in Dune CI via [ocaml/dune#14078](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/pull/14078), catching `opam lint` failures on `.opam` files on every relevant PR
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Robin Bate Boerop](https://github.com/robinbb) develops per-module inter-library dependency filtering in [ocaml/dune#14116](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/pull/14116), using ocamldep output to eliminate unnecessary recompilation
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Tim ats](https://github.com/Tim-ats-d) develops support for pointing indexes in ocaml-index in [ocaml/merlin#2051](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2051); [Charlène Gros](https://github.com/Lucccyo) opened [ocaml/merlin#2050](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2050) replacing an unbounded `Hashtbl` with an LRU cache to bound ocaml-index memory growth
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Anil Madhavapeddy](https://github.com/avsm) opened [ocaml/opam#6880](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6880) fixing GC root registration in the `uname` C stub; [Kate](https://github.com/kit-ty-kate) opened [ocaml/opam#6879](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6879) to remove OCaml 4.08–4.10 build support and [ocaml/opam#6878](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6878) for dependency lower-bound cleanup
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Paul-Elliot Anglès d'Auriac](https://github.com/panglesd) marked [ocaml/odoc#1406](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1406) ready for review, adding support for OCaml 5.5 external types and module arrows; [@art-w](https://github.com/art-w) addressed review feedback on [ocaml/odoc#1399](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1399) for OxCaml upstream support
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Jérôme Vouillon](https://github.com/vouillon) opened two Wasm optimization PRs after the dynlink merge: constant expressions into global variables halving toplevel function size ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2211](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2211)) and loop extraction to avoid wasteful Wasm engine tier-up ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2212](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2212))
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Caqti** 2.3.0 (7 packages) released by [Petter A. Urkedal](https://github.com/paurkedal) ([ocaml/opam-repository#29690](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29690)); **letsencrypt** 2.1.0 by [Calascibetta Romain](https://github.com/dinosaure) ([ocaml/opam-repository#29688](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29688)); **ffmpeg** 1.3.0 and **liquidsoap** 2.4.3 by [Romain Beauxis](https://github.com/toots) ([ocaml/opam-repository#29703](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29703), [ocaml/opam-repository#29708](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29708))
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **runtime_events_tools** 0.5.4 released by [Tim McGilchrist](https://github.com/tmcgilchrist) reinstating the `olly latency` command ([ocaml/opam-repository#29694](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29694)); **textmate-language** 0.6.0 by [Alan](https://github.com/alan-j-hu) prevents tokenizer hangs from zero-width regex loops ([ocaml/opam-repository#29706](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29706)); **qcow** 0.14.0 fixes handling of images larger than 4TB ([ocaml/opam-repository#29696](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29696))

-**runtime_events_tools** 0.5.4 released by [Tim McGilchrist](https://github.com/tmcgilchrist) reinstating the `olly latency` command ([ocaml/opam-repository#29694](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29694)); **textmate-language** 0.6.0 by [Alan](https://github.com/alan-j-hu) prevents tokenizer hangs from zero-width regex loops ([ocaml/opam-repository#29706](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29706)); **qcow** 0.14.0 fixes handling of images larger than 4TB ([ocaml/opam-repository#29696](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29696))
oxcaml: -**Flambda2 `dep_solver.ml`** split into separate modules by [Nathanaëlle Courant](https://github.com/Ekdohibs) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5776](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5776)) with follow-up cleanup ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5787](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5787)) and `field_{usages,sources}_top` removal ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5748](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5748)); **reaper code size computation** opened ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5793](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5793))

-**Draft SSA CFG backend variant** opened by [@ttebbi-janestreet](https://github.com/ttebbi-janestreet) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5810](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5810)); **empty loop deletion using induction variable analysis** draft opened by [Mark Shinwell](https://github.com/mshinwell) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5840](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5840))

-**Unboxed record/variant representation** rationalisation: all-value/void mixed records proposed as uniform blocks ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5774](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5774)), `float64` records as mixed blocks ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5796](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5796)), and `[@@flatten_floats]` requirement for mixed `float`/`float64` records ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5795](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5795)), all by [Ryan Tjoa](https://github.com/rtjoa)

-**Layout polymorphism correctness** improved: instantiation restricted to static values ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5783](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5783)), var instantiation error changed to `fatal_error` ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5817](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5817)), `lpoly` generalise simplified via path compression by [Zesen Qian](https://github.com/riaqn) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5792](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5792))

-**Patricia trees** gained `union_total` function families to avoid allocations ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5803](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5803)) and callback modules for function specialisation ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5770](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5770)); **persistent env wrapper partial applications** eliminated, saving ~100 MB allocation when compiling `typecore.ml` ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5631](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5631))

-**Metaprogramming REPL** syntax directive issue fixed by [Andrej Ivašković](https://github.com/Dreian) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5801](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5801)); **graceful reporting of unsupported language features** in runtime metaprogramming merged ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5823](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5823))

weekly_summary.cross_repository_work:
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Primitive aliases RFC-to-implementation**: [ocaml/RFCs#44](https://github.com/ocaml/RFCs/issues/44) completed its full RFC-to-merge cycle with the implementation landing in [ocaml/ocaml#13377](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13377); [Nailen Matschke](https://github.com/nmatschke) authored the implementation after review by [Jeremy Yallop](https://github.com/yallop), [Leo White](https://github.com/lpw25), and [Florian Angeletti](https://github.com/Octachron)
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Implicit source positions RFC #52 → future ocaml/ocaml work**: design discussion in [ocaml/RFCs#52](https://github.com/ocaml/RFCs/issues/52) between [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) and [Olivier Nicole](https://github.com/OlivierNicole) narrowed the implementation strategy to options 2a/2b, with 2a as an acceptable incremental first step before work moves to [ocaml/ocaml](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml)
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **OCaml 5.4 upgrade across OxCaml repositories**: Runtime 5 set as default in [oxcaml/oxcaml#5780](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5780) and 5.4 testsuite merge at [oxcaml/oxcaml#5757](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5757), Merlin 5.4 opam dependency bump at [oxcaml/merlin#227](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/227), and bootstrap compiler update at [oxcaml/opam-repository#36](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository/issues/36) pending workflow resolution
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **ocamlformat 0.29.0 coordinated upgrade**: both [oxcaml/oxcaml#5777](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5777) and [oxcaml/merlin#227](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/227) reformatted their codebases in the same week; [David Allsopp](https://github.com/dra27)'s review of [oxcaml/opam-repository#36](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository/issues/36) identified a missing `ocaml-variants.opam` file tracked as [oxcaml/oxcaml#5344](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5344), linking opam packaging concerns back to the main compiler repository
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **Merlin → ocaml-lsp feature pipeline**: the new `refactor-extract-region` command in merlin v5.7.0-504 ([ocaml/merlin#1948](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/1948)) is directly exposed as `ocamllsp/refactorExtract` in ocaml-lsp 1.26.0 ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1545](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1545)); merlin's `destruct` and `locate-types` improvements flow into new custom requests ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1583](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1583), [ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1584](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1584)); coordinated release managed by [PixieDust](https://github.com/PizieDust) and [Ulysse](https://github.com/voodoos)
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **ocaml-lsp build system agnosticism** via `merlin-dot-protocol`: [ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1600](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1600) enables ocaml-lsp to obtain Merlin configuration from non-Dune build systems, breaking a long-standing Dune-only assumption shared between [ocaml/ocaml-lsp](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp) and [ocaml/merlin](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin)
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Coordinated toolchain releases to opam-repository**: dune 3.22.2 ([ocaml/opam-repository#29704](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29704)), merlin 5.7.0-504 and ocaml-lsp-server 1.26.0 ([ocaml/opam-repository#29689](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29689)) published with corresponding release changelogs on [ocaml/ocaml.org](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org) by [PixieDust](https://github.com/PizieDust) ([ocaml/ocaml.org#3605](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3605)) and [Shon Feder](https://github.com/shonfeder) ([ocaml/ocaml.org#3596](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3596))

weekly_summary.notable_discussions:
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Ephemeron orphaning and adoption semantics** analysed in [ocaml/ocaml#14720](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14720) by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche), questioning whether orphaned ephemerons should survive across GC cycles; the thread involves [Damien Doligez](https://github.com/damiendoligez), [KC Sivaramakrishnan](https://github.com/kayceesrk), [Nick Barnes](https://github.com/NickBarnes), and [Stephen Dolan](https://github.com/stedolan)
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Adding extension points to the AST** for ppxlib compatibility discussed in [ocaml/ocaml#14668](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14668) by [Nathan Rebours](https://github.com/NathanReb), exploring how to encode new language features without breaking existing ppx-es
- __RUMINANT:core__ **`Atomic.fold_update` naming** continued in [ocaml/ocaml#14725](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14725), with [Simon Cruanes](https://github.com/c-cube) and [Daniel Bünzli](https://github.com/dbuenzli) preferring `modify_get` or `map_update` over `fold_update`
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **`caml_modify` skip for `non_pointer` values** ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5831](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5831)) includes detailed discussion of interactions with abstract kinds, type substitution edge cases, and how mixed block representations can become stale after substitution
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Flambda2 export info section storage** ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5809](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5809)) prompted [Mark Shinwell](https://github.com/mshinwell) to suggest making section storage more generic to also accommodate Slambda code for layout poly
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Bootstrap compiler update** in [oxcaml/opam-repository#36](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository/issues/36): [David Allsopp](https://github.com/dra27) raised that replacing the bootstrap compiler entry breaks the existing workflow for the `5.2.0minus-25` tag; [Eduardo Souza](https://github.com/udesou) clarified the intended workflow via `opam compiler create oxcaml:main` ([ocaml-opam/opam-compiler#42](https://github.com/ocaml-opam/opam-compiler/issues/42))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **`dune monitor` long-term roadmap** outlined in [ocaml/dune#14121](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14121): moving to a separate binary, replacing Fiber with Lwt, unvendoring Notty/Lwd, and communicating over RPC and trace files, by [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg)
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **odoc `@inline` tag** proof-of-concept ([ocaml/odoc#1408](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1408)) sparked renewed discussion in [ocaml/odoc#564](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/564): [Daniel Bünzli](https://github.com/dbuenzli) argued user-controlled module inlining breaks predictable URL structures; [Martin Jambon](https://github.com/mjambon) suggested sane defaults with opt-in overrides
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **ocaml-index on-disk pointing** design in [ocaml/merlin#2051](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2051): [@art-w](https://github.com/art-w) raised placement of `id` field in store type; [Ulysse](https://github.com/voodoos) proposed an `Outdated_store of [ \`Missing_file of string | \`Index_ids_do_not_match ]` exception type for outdated build error reporting
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **Expired PGP signing key** reported in [ocaml/opam#6877](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6877) by [Dmitrii Kosarev](https://github.com/Kakadu), triaged by [R. Boujbel](https://github.com/rjbou) linking the renewal work at [ocaml-opam/opam2web#254](https://github.com/ocaml-opam/opam2web/issues/254), confirmed resolved by [Kate](https://github.com/kit-ty-kate)

weekly_summary.emerging_trends:
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Typechecker correctness milestones**: the keep-expansion merge [ocaml/ocaml#11648](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/11648) resolves deep-seated non-termination and principality bugs; follow-on work is expected around class types and recursive modules, continuing a multi-year effort to put the typechecker on firmer foundations
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Ephemeron GC hardening for multicore**: [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) opened a structured multi-PR series ([ocaml/ocaml#14732](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14732)–[ocaml/ocaml#14735](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14735)) to systematically clarify and fix ephemeron lifecycle management, motivated by multicoretests reproductions from [Jan Midtgaard](https://github.com/jmid) in [ocaml/ocaml#14349](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14349)
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Stdlib completeness for immutable and dynamic arrays**: `pp_print_iarray` [ocaml/ocaml#14724](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14724) and `pp_print_dynarray` [ocaml/ocaml#14726](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14726) reflect ongoing work to bring `iarray` and `Dynarray` to feature parity with `Array`, with further gaps tracked in [ocaml/ocaml#14320](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14320)
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Unboxed record/variant representation rationalisation** proceeding systematically: all-value/void mixed records as uniform blocks ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5774](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5774)), `float64` records as mixed blocks ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5796](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5796)), and legacy float-array representation requiring explicit opt-in ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5795](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5795))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Layout polymorphism infrastructure maturing**: multiple PRs this week fixed sort variable level handling ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5791](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5791)), instantiation errors ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5817](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5817)), and generalisation correctness ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5792](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5792)), indicating the feature is converging toward stability
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **SSA CFG variant opens loop optimisation path**: the draft [oxcaml/oxcaml#5810](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5810) opens a path to loop-level optimisations such as empty loop deletion ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5840](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5840)) directly on the CFG IR
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **Coordinated toolchain releases**: dune 3.22.2, merlin v5.7.0-504, and ocaml-lsp 1.26.0 released in the same week by overlapping teams, reflecting synchronized toolchain updates across interrelated projects
